items.title: Static audit
items.desc: Reads your test code only - no runtime, no execution

items.title: Playwright & Cypress
items.desc: locator + getBy*, cy.get / contains / find, aliases & chains

items.title: Selenium (Java)
items.desc: By.* + @FindBy Page Objects + Selenide, in .java files (beta)

items.title: Paste or scan
items.desc: Drop in a snippet or point us at a folder. No project setup.

items.title: Fragility classes
items.desc: Fragile, stable, context, or dynamic - judged by the locator's shape, not by flaky-test history.

items.title: Generated ids
items.desc: Framework ids that change between builds (React, Radix, MUI) - caught even inside compound selectors like .cart-footer #mui-42.

items.title: Positional & structural
items.desc: Index picks (.nth, .eq), deep combinator chains, and positional CSS/XPath - tied to where an element sits, not what it is.

items.title: Styling & loose text
items.desc: Utility class stacks (Tailwind-style) and loose text matches (regex, substring, exact:false) - neither styling nor copy is a stable contract.

items.title: Coverage
items.desc: What we classified and what stayed dynamic - so nothing hides in the gap.

items.title: Why, not just what
items.desc: Explains why a locator is fragile and hands you a copy-ready fix - advice, not an auto-edit.

items.title: How we judge
items.desc: The full rubric - every class, the method, and the sources behind it. The same one we publish in FRAGILITY.md.

items.title: Duplicates & hot files
items.desc: Same selector across N places; files ranked by fragile

items.title: Filters & sort
items.desc: Show only fragile or hide a kind; sort by file, duplicates or hot files

items.title: Export & save
items.desc: Download HTML / PDF, or save a report to your account

items.title: Runs locally
items.desc: Folder analyzed in your browser - code never leaves the page

items.title: Open source
items.desc: MIT, no signup, no data collected

nextDesc: Candidates for the next version. Vote for what matters - it shapes the scope.

next.title: Mute a rule
next.desc: Soften or silence a rule for your project

next.title: My stable list
next.desc: Mark attributes you treat as stable

next.title: Delta vs last run
next.desc: Load a previous report - see what changed
